headline: Halliburton Co. (NYSE:HAL) Caviar Cruise Screen Analysis: Quality Investing Metrics Examined
summary: Quality investing screen evaluates Halliburton: strong EBIT growth (17.79%), ROIC above 15%, manageable debt, and solid cash conversion, but revenue growth below 5% threshold.

headline: Nvidia, Meta and Schlumberger rank among top companies in adopting AI, new study says
summary: The AI-Driven Enterprise Institute released new research that breaks down the degree to which S&P 500 companies are adopting AI compared with their peers.
